CS110: Winter 2022

Intro to Computer Programming with Python

CS110: Winter 2022

  • Syllabus
  • Schedule
  • Assignments
  • Calendar
  • Campuswire

Schedule

Note: This schedule is subject to change (as needed). In addition, unless otherwise indicated, tutorials are always due on Wednesday at 11:59PM and homework is always due on Friday at 11:59PM.

Week Lesson Topic Due
Week 1 01/03/22 Mon, 01/03 Lesson 0 Introduction
  • Intro to the course
01/05/22 Wed, 01/05 Lesson 1 Intro to Hardware and Software
  • What is hardware?
  • What is software?
  • What are some "real world" analogies?
01/07/22 Fri, 01/07 Lesson 2 Writing Programs
  • Programs, operators, and data types
HW0 Sign up for a Tutorial Session
Week 2 01/10/22 Mon, 01/10 Lesson 3 Variables & Functions
  • Variables...what are they good for?
  • Using built-in Functions
01/12/22 Wed, 01/12 Lesson 4 Lists & Tuples
  • List, tuples, and other strange data types
Tutorial 1 Get Python Running
01/14/22 Fri, 01/14 Lesson 5 Zooming in on Functions
  • Using functions
  • Creating your own functions
  • Defining versus invoking functions
HW1 Installation & Introductory Exercises
Week 3 01/19/22 Wed, 01/19 Lesson 6 Creating Your Own Functions
  • Exploring and defining functions
Tutorial 2 Practice with Functions
01/21/22 Fri, 01/21 Lesson 7 Defining Functions and Abstraction
  • More defining functions
HW2 Intro to Tkinter
Week 4 01/24/22 Mon, 01/24 Lesson 8 Modules, Scope & Review
  • Modules & Scope
  • Operators & Data Types
  • Lists & Tuples
  • Functions
01/26/22 Wed, 01/26 Lesson 9 Review: Week 3
  • Defining Functions
  • Variables & Variable Scope
  • Modules
Tutorial 3 Practice with Parameters & Arguments
01/27/22 Thu, 01/27 HW3 Make a Creature
01/28/22 Fri, 01/28 quiz 1 Quiz 1
  • Quiz 1 of 3 (using the Lockdown Browser)
QUIZ 1
Week 5 01/31/22 Mon, 01/31 Lesson 10 Conditional Execution & Boolean Logic
  • If / Else
  • Booleans
02/02/22 Wed, 02/02 Lesson 11 While Loops
  • What do you want to repeat?
  • How long do you want to repeat it?
  • What changes each time (optional)?
Tutorial 4 Practice with Conditionals
02/04/22 Fri, 02/04 Lesson 12 More Practice: While Loops & If Statements
  • Practice using if / elif / else
  • Practice using while loops
Week 6 02/07/22 Mon, 02/07 Lesson 13 More Loops
  • Animation and While Loops
  • Intro to for loops syntax
  • Using for loops with lists and sequences
02/09/22 Wed, 02/09 Lesson 14 More Practice with For Loops & Sequences
  • Practice using for loops to process data
Tutorial 5 For Loops Activity
02/11/22 Fri, 02/11 Lesson 15 User Inputs & Events
  • Expanding your I/O repertoire
  • Click, drag, and keyboard events
HW4 Animations & Landscapes
Week 7 02/14/22 Mon, 02/14 Lesson 16 More on Events and Listeners
  • Animating creatures
02/16/22 Wed, 02/16 Lesson 17 Command Line and PIP
  • More on the "Command Line"
  • Introduction to PIP
Tutorial 6 Event Handlers
02/18/22 Fri, 02/18 quiz 2 Quiz 2
  • Quiz 2 of 3 (using the Lockdown Browser)
QUIZ 2
Week 8 02/25/22 Fri, 02/25 P1 Make an Interactive Animation
Week 10 03/11/22 Fri, 03/11 quiz 3 Quiz 3 QUIZ 3

Department of Computer Science, Northwestern University.

Special thanks to Prof. Sarah Van Wart who first developed this curriculum.
